idea-plugin.name: Git Muse
idea-plugin.description:
Git Muse generates Conventional Commits messages from your staged diff using an LLM.

Adds a button to the Commit dialog: click it, and a clear, format-correct commit message appears in the message field for you to review and edit before committing. Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — OpenAI, Groq's free tier, a local Ollama server, OpenRouter, and others — configured in Settings → Tools → Git Muse.
